allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @colecta/api exec prisma migrate dev --name init)
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} bins'\); [print\(' -', b['code'], b['name'], b['status']\) for b in data]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} tasks'\); [print\(' -', t['title'], '[', t['status'], '/', t['priority'], ']'\) for t in data]")

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"teste@colecta.com","name":"Teste","senha":"123456"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/users" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails.Message\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/health" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "HEALTH OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "HEALTH ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/trash-bins" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "TRASH-BINS OK"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "TRASH-BINS ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"teste@colecta.com","name":"Teste","senha":"123456"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/users" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "CADASTRO OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "CADASTRO ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails.Message\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"teste@colecta.com","senha":"123456"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "LOGIN OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json; $token = $r.access_token; Write-Output "`n--- testando /users/me com o token ---"; $me = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3333/users/me" -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"} -TimeoutSec 10; $me | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails.Message\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'colecta'; & docker exec -i $\(docker ps --filter ancestor=postgres --format '{{.Names}}' | Select-Object -First 1\) psql -U colecta -d colecta -c "SELECT migration_name, finished_at, rolled_back_at, applied_steps_count FROM _prisma_migrations ORDER BY started_at;" 2>&1)

Bash(DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile --build-arg VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3333 -t colecta-web:test .)

PowerShell($sql = 'SELECT t.code, t.name, l.name AS location FROM trash_bins t JOIN locations l ON l.id=t."locationId" ORDER BY t.code;'; docker exec colecta-postgres psql -U colecta -d colecta -c $sql)
